rulings.Case Title: WALTER KAESSMEYER VS. PATRICIA E BOSSLER et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Mtn To Strike And/Or Tax Costs
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, April 11, 2012, line 1. PLAINTIFF WALTER KAESSMEYER's Motion To Strike And/Or Tax Costs. Grant Motion 1) attorney fees, no prevailing party; 2) No reimbursement for IFP. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: WALTER KAESSMEYER VS. PATRICIA E BOSSLER et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Mtn To Be Declared Prevailing Party And For Reasonable Atty'S Fees
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, April 11, 2012, line 1. DEFENDANT PATRICIA BOSSLER's Motion To Be Declared Prevailing Party And For Reasonable Attorney'S Fees. Deny - Court finds no prevailing party. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: IN JU KIM VS. CRYSTAL DENNIS et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, April 11, 2012, line 2. DEFENDANT CRYSTAL DENNIS' MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT. Hearing required. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JOHN VLAHOS VS. MARIA ATONDO et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, April 11, 2012, line 3. DEFENDANT MARIA ATONDO's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Overrule, five days to answer, notice amount correct. Complaint amount not in excess. = (501/REQ)
